customAttributes.description: Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell that targets only Zada, Hedron Grinder, copy that spell for each other creature you control that the spell could target. Each copy targets a different one of those creatures.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/21/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: To her delight, she was able to fully realize the explosive magical potential of hedrons.
